name: M G's School Transport LLC

name: Kam Enterprises
districts_or_customers: Howard County Public School System (HCPSS) - contractor
recent_news: K A M Enterprises Inc (USDOT 825915) is a long-running independent HCPSS school bus contractor based in Sykesville/Glenelg MD; Keith Mullinix serves as president of the association of independent HCPSS contractors, indicating leadership role in the local contractor base.
fit_notes: Established family-owned HCPSS contractor in Maryland (a Summit core state); ~24 buses fits classic tuck-in profile. Owner's leadership of the HCPSS independent contractor association is a strong relationship/roll-up angle for Summit, though small standalone size.

name: I & R Transportation
recent_news: No public web presence located for 'I & R Transportation' at 39 Boylston St, Boston; address is a downtown Boston building suite which is atypical for a school bus operator (no bus yard). Could not confirm school bus operations - possibly a small SPED/livery van contractor or mailing address only.
fit_notes: Cannot verify as a school-bus operator; downtown Boston office suite and 13-employee footprint suggest a micro SPED/van contractor at best. Not a credible Summit tuck-in without further confirmation.

name: Lone Star School Bus SVC LLC
districts_or_customers: Central Texas school districts (incl. likely Rockdale ISD area)
recent_news: Lone Star School Bus Services LLC (USDOT 4304895) operates from Rockdale TX serving Central Texas school districts; offers school bus repair/maintenance, 24/7 emergency service, CDL training, and inspections per company website.
fit_notes: Independent Central Texas operator with active website and a service/repair + CDL training arm beyond core school routes. Small standalone but plausible bolt-on in TX expansion geography; differentiated by in-house maintenance capability.

name: T G Bus LLC
recent_news: No public web presence, website, or district contract evidence located for T G Bus LLC; listed address (12912 Hill Country Blvd #F-20, Bee Cave) is a Hill Country Galleria retail/office suite, not a bus yard - suggests registered/mailing address only.
